resources.string: Connect to Baby Buddy server in two ways: enter your Baby Buddy server address, username, and password, then tap the login button to connect the app to the server. Or choose the QR code login method (scroll down for details).

You can also log in to your Baby Buddy server using a login QR code. Please use another device to log in to your Baby Buddy server, then access the \"Add Device\" page through the user menu (top right) to find the login QR code. Scan it with this app on your phone. Once scanned, tap \"Login Now\" to sign in.
If you are using an http address instead of https, the app will show this warning. Please only use this feature for local Baby Buddy servers within networks you control!
Baby Buddy for Android partially supports logging in to Baby Buddy servers hosted on Home Assistant Ingress servers. You will need to use the QR code login method to log in to such servers.

After logging in, you will find buttons for logging activities at the top of the screen, and recent activity history displayed below. If you log activities for multiple children, you can swipe left and right to switch between them.
To start a timer, tap one of the timer event buttons at the top of the screen. This will start a timer.
After starting a timer, the interface related to that timer will open. Fill in all the information you want to record. Once all required fields are filled, a save button will appear.
Once the save button appears, you can tap the save button to stop the timer. You can also tap the timer button at the top again to cancel the timer instead of saving.

In addition to timer events, the top button row also allows logging non-timer events such as diaper changes and general notes. Controls are the same as timer logging, but without the timer functionality.

The event history at the bottom of the screen shows recent activity for the selected child. You can long-press an entry in the history for three seconds to edit it. This will open the corresponding page in the Baby Buddy app. To delete the entry, tap the red \"Delete\" button.
